'''Defeen''' was a [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he served as an [[Interrogator First Class]] at the [[Imperial Reprogramming Institute]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. As chief of Experimental Section Two, Defeen oversaw the reprogramming efforts of [[Triclops]].

Despite Triclops's escape from his clutches, Defeen was relocated to [[Scardia Station]] and promoted to [[Interrogator Supreme]] by the false [[Prophets of the Dark Side]]. As their personal interrogator, Defeen was tasked with the [[Treason/Legends|treason]] case against the the [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moffs]] of the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs|Central Committee]].
